title: SimpleBedrockModel
description: A library for loading Minecraft Bedrock Edition entity models
body:
# SimpleBedrockModel

SimpleBedrockModel is a lightweight Minecraft Java library designed to help developers parse and handle Minecraft Bedrock Edition model files with ease. Whether you're developing mods, automation tools, or any application that needs to interact with Bedrock models, this library provides a simple and effective solution.

## Features
- 100% pure Java implementation for easy integration and distribution  
- Supports parsing Minecraft Bedrock Edition model files  
- Clean and user-friendly API for straightforward usage and secondary development  

## License
This project is licensed under the [LGPLv3](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/lgpl-3.0.html), allowing free use, modification, and distribution.

## Get Started
Visit the [GitHub repository](https://github.com/TartaricAcid/SimpleBedrockModel) for source code and documentation.

---

Feedback and contributions are always welcome!
